tasks.description: Unit tests for orchestrator-config.ts pure functions — blacklist, filter, constants
tasks.context:
backend/src/services/orchestrator-config.ts exports pure functions and constants with no external dependencies — ideal for zero-mock unit tests.

CREATE: backend/src/services/__tests__/orchestrator-config.test.ts (max 100 lines)

Tests:
1. META_TASK_BLACKLIST contains exactly ['ORCH-001', 'QUALITY-001']
2. validTaskTypes contains all 5 expected types (feature, bugfix, ops, agent_creation, refactor)
3. SPRINT_CAPACITY.min === 5, SPRINT_CAPACITY.max === 9
4. isBlacklistedTaskId('ORCH-001') → true (exact match)
5. isBlacklistedTaskId('QUALITY-001') → true (exact match)
6. isBlacklistedTaskId('ORCH-001-SUB-TASK') → true (startsWith match)
7. isBlacklistedTaskId('orch-001') → true (case-insensitive via toUpperCase)
8. isBlacklistedTaskId('FEATURE-001') → false
9. isBlacklistedTaskId('') → false
10. filterBlacklistedTaskIds(['ORCH-001', 'FEATURE-001', 'QUALITY-001-X']) → ['FEATURE-001']
11. filterBlacklistedTaskIds([]) → []
12. filterBlacklistedTaskIds(['FEATURE-001', 'BUGFIX-002']) → ['FEATURE-001', 'BUGFIX-002'] (no change)

Min: 12 tests. No mocking required.

tasks.description: Unit tests for SupabaseApiKeyRepository — findById, findByCustomerId, findByKeyPrefix, create, update, delete, rotate
tasks.context:
backend/src/services/api-key-repo-supabase.ts exports SupabaseApiKeyRepository implementing ApiKeyRepository interface. Mock @supabase/supabase-js createClient.

CREATE: backend/src/services/__tests__/api-key-repo-supabase.test.ts (max 200 lines)

Mock strategy: jest.mock('@supabase/supabase-js', ...) + set env vars in beforeEach.

Key tests:
1. findById — returns null when row not found (single() returns null)
2. findById — returns mapped ApiKey with correct field names (id, customerId, keyHash, etc.)
3. findByCustomerId — returns array of mapped keys
4. findByCustomerId — returns empty array when no rows
5. findByKeyPrefix — returns null when not found
6. findByKeyPrefix — returns mapped key when found
7. create — throws on Supabase insert error
8. create — returns mapped ApiKey on success
9. update — throws on Supabase update error
10. update — returns mapped ApiKey with updated fields
11. delete — returns true when no error
12. delete — returns false when error occurs
13. rotate — throws when key not found (delegates to findById)
14. rowToApiKey mapping — customerEmail defaults to {customerId}@agents.invoica.ai when null

Min: 12 tests.

tasks.description: Unit tests for SettlementPollerService — SettlementPollerError class and constructor validation
tasks.context:
backend/src/services/settlement-poller.ts exports SettlementPollerService (Prisma + Bull + axios). Focus on what is unit-testable without running infrastructure.

CREATE: backend/src/services/__tests__/settlement-poller.test.ts (max 150 lines)

Mock: jest.mock('bull'), jest.mock('axios'), jest.mock('@prisma/client', () => ({ PrismaClient: jest.fn().mockImplementation(() => ({})) }))

Tests:
1. SettlementPollerError — message is stored correctly
2. SettlementPollerError — code is stored correctly  
3. SettlementPollerError — cause is optional (undefined when not passed)
4. SettlementPollerError — cause is stored when passed
5. SettlementPollerError — name is 'SettlementPollerError'
6. PayAISettlement interface shape — status enum only accepts 'settled' | 'pending' | 'failed'
7. SettlementPollerService constructor — instantiates without throwing given valid config
8. SettlementPollerService constructor — stores config values correctly

Min: 8 tests.
